'''vozalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utilized|utilized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utilized|utilized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || vozalithi || vozaliji || vozalishi || vozaliki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || vozaluthu || vozaluju || vozalushu || vozaluku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || vozaluthu || vozaluju || vozalushu || vozaluku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || vozalufthuf || vozalufjuf || vozalufshuf || vozalufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || vozalethe || vozaleje || vozaleshe || vozaleke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vozalotho || vozalojo || vozalosho || vozaloko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vozalotho || vozalojo || vozalosho || vozaloko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vozalofthof || vozalofjof || vozalofshof || vozalofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || vozalïfthïf || vozalïfjïf || vozalïfshïf || vozalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || vozalïfthïf || vozalïfjïf || vozalïfshïf || vozalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || vozalïfthïf || vozalïfjïf || vozalïfshïf || vozalïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || vozalïfthïf || vozalïfjïf || vozalïfshïf || vozalïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vozalæthæ || vozalæjæ || vozalæshæ || vozalækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vozalatha || vozalaja || vozalasha || vozalaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vozalatha || vozalaja || vozalasha || vozalaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vozalafthaf || vozalafjaf || vozalafshaf || vozalafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || vozalasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || vozalshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || vozalroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || vozalmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || vozalyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govozalnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govozalnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govozalnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govozalnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || vozazalasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || vozazalshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || vozazalroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || vozazalmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || vozazalyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govozazalnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govozazalnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govozazalnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govozazalnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || vezælasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || vezælshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || vezælroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || vezælmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || vezælyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govezælnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govezælnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govezælnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govezælnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || vozfalasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || vozfalshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || vozfalroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || vozfalmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || vozfalyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || govozfalnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || govozfalnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || govozfalnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || govozfalnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
